The Origin Story

Elon Introduced
Marvin to the World

On March 12, 2016, Elon Musk posted a photo of a tiny black fluffy puppy to his Instagram with the caption: "New member of the family. Marvin the..."

25,801 likes. One legendary dog. The rest is history.

"New member of the family. Marvin the..."

— Elon Musk, Instagram · March 12, 2016

$MARVIN is a tribute to that moment — the calm, the cool, the dog who watched Elon build rockets and just stayed unbothered. Community-driven. Zero tax. Pure Marvin energy.

How to Buy $MARVIN

01
Get Phantom

Download Metamask or any Ethereum wallet. Set it up and keep your seed phrase safe.

02
Get SOL

Buy ETH on Coinbase, Binance, or Kraken and transfer it to your Metamask wallet.

03
Go to Uniswap

Visit app.uniswap.org, connect your wallet and paste the $MARVIN contract address.

04
Buy & Hold

Swap ETH for $MARVIN. Set slippage 1–2%. Confirm and welcome to the pack. Stay calm. Hold like Marvin. 🐾
